Noi_dung_kiem_tra: Khong con tai khoan/mat khau mac dinh tren bat ky thiet bi nao
MFA van duoc bat cho cac tai khoan quan tri quan trong
Khong co port forwarding hoac dich vu mo ra Internet ngoai danh sach cho phep
Mat khau Wi-Fi du manh, mang IoT tach biet voi mang nguoi dung
Firmware camera, router, gateway duoc cap nhat phien ban moi nhat
Log truy cap/canh bao duoc luu day du, khong bi chinh sua bat thuong
Camera, cam bien, khoa cua hoat dong binh thuong, khong co dau hieu thao lap la
Dashboard cloud hien thi dung trang thai thuc te cua thiet bi
Ung dung dieu khien co khoa man hinh, khong luu mat khau tu dong khong ma hoa
Kiem tra UPS/nguon du phong va kha nang khoi phuc khi mat mang
